title: A Message From Ahtna, Inc. Regarding the Port Isabel Detention Center (PIDC)
summary: The Port Isabel Detention Center (PIDC) in Los Fresnos, TX has been in the news lately in connection with the ongoing national discussion regarding U.S. immigration policies. Ahtna Support and Training Services (AhtnaSTS) [1] has a contract to provide detention center services at PIDC, and a story by The Daily Beast contained several inaccuracies and misrepresentations about our management of this facility. We wanted to take a moment to clarify a few key facts – and address how the core values of our corporation with regard to respect, safety, quality and integrity gu...
